  FreeBSD ports repository

  Log:
  Net::POP3::SSLWrapper is simple POP3S wrapper for Net::POP3.
  
  You can easy to support POP3S, with very small code change.
  
  PR:             ports/141694
  Submitted by:   johnpupu <johnpupu_AT_gmail dot com>
